testcase.name: TC_004HardCloseDateVerification

failure.message:
Hard Close date element not found. Tried the following XPaths: By.xpath: //label[contains(normalize-space(),'Hard Close')]/following-sibling::*[1] By.xpath: //label[contains(normalize-space(),'Hard Close')]/following::input[1] By.xpath: //*[contains(normalize-space(),'Hard Close')]/following::div[1] By.xpath: //input[contains(@aria-label,'Hard Close') or contains(@placeholder,'Hard Close') or contains(@name,'hardClose')]
For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#no-such-element-exception Build info: version: '4.34.0', revision: '707dcb4246*' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.2' Driver info: driver.version: unknown

testcase.failure:
org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: Hard Close date element not found. Tried the following XPaths: By.xpath: //label[contains(normalize-space(),'Hard Close')]/following-sibling::*[1] By.xpath: //label[contains(normalize-space(),'Hard Close')]/following::input[1] By.xpath: //*[contains(normalize-space(),'Hard Close')]/following::div[1] By.xpath: //input[contains(@aria-label,'Hard Close') or contains(@placeholder,'Hard Close') or contains(@name,'hardClose')]
For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#no-such-element-exception Build info: version: '4.34.0', revision: '707dcb4246*' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.2' Driver info: driver.version: unknown at com.Octopussaas.ObjectRepository.BillingSettings.getHardCloseDate(BillingSettings.java:312) at OctopussaasBillingSettings.TC_004HardCloseTextField.TC_004HardCloseDateVerification(TC_004HardCloseTextField.java:55) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) ... Removed 25 stack frames
